ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/3 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Ogre attacks Goblin — Armored Tank with Greatclub: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Goblin — Armored Tank HP: 8/59
--- Goblin — Armored Tank's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Goblin — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Goblin — Armored Tank.
→ Goblin — Armored Tank healed for 7 HP. HP: 15/59
=== ROUND 3 ===
